title: IP-allowlist contract (authored for the IP-allowlist-enforcement testing task)
description: Each restricted endpoint is fronted by an IP allowlist (an AWS-WAF-style IP set). An allowlisted source IP must receive success_code with the resource data; a non-allowlisted source IP must receive forbidden_code with no resource data; the allowlist decision must NOT honor the X-Forwarded-For header; and the management API can add/remove an IP from the set. Agents construct the IP-allowlist test plan from this; ground truth is the live local gateway's observed behavior. DummyJSON is never used or modified — the target is the local ip-allowlist-gateway.
